**输出：**3

fun solve(m: Long, n: Long, waitCost: Array<Array<Long>>): Long {
    val rows = m.toInt()
    val cols = n.toInt()
    val INF = Long.MAX_VALUE
    val dist = Array(rows) { Array(cols) { Array(2) { INF } } }
    // Initialize the starting point
    val startCost = (0 + 1) * (0 + 1)
    dist[0][0][1] = startCost
    // Priority queue: (cost, i, j, parity)
    val pq = PriorityQueue< Triple<Long, Int, Int, Int> > { a, b -> a.first.compareTo(b.first) }
    pq.add(Triple(startCost, 0, 0, 1))
    // Directions for moving: right (0,1) and down (1,0)
    val directions = arrayOf(intArrayOf(0,1), intArrayOf(1,0))
    while (pq.isNotEmpty()) {
        val (currentCost, i, j, parity) = pq.remove()
        // Check if we reached the destination
        if (i == rows - 1 && j == cols - 1) {
            return currentCost
        }
        // If current cost is higher than the recorded distance, skip
        if (currentCost > dist[i][j][parity]) {
            continue
        }
        // Process transitions based on parity
        if (parity == 0) {
            // Even time: must wait. Add wait cost and transition to parity 1
            val newCost = currentCost + waitCost[i][j]
            if (newCost < dist[i][j][1]) {
                dist[i][j][1] = newCost
                pq.add(Triple(newCost, i, j, 1))
            }
        } else {
            // Odd time: must move. Try moving right and down
            for (dir in directions) {
                val ni = i + dir[0]
                val nj = j + dir[1]
                if (ni >= 0 && ni < rows && nj >= 0 && nj < cols) {
                    val newCost = currentCost + (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)
                    val newParity = 0 // since parity was 1, time increases by 1 to even

                        dist[ni][nj][newParity] = newCost
                        pq.add(Triple(newCost, ni, nj, newParity))
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    // If we exit the loop without returning, there's no path (but the problem says there is one)
    return INF
}

    val distOdd = Array(rows) { Array(cols) { Long.MAX_VALUE } }
    val distEven = Array(rows) { Array(cols) { Long.MAX_VALUE } }

            }
        }
    }

    // If no path found (should not happen)
    return Long.MAX_VALUE

import java.util.*

fun solve(m: Long, n: Long, waitCost: Array<Array<Long>>): Long {
    val rows = m.toInt()
    val cols = n.toInt()
    val INF = Long.MAX_VALUE

    // Initialize distance array
    val dist = Array(rows) { i ->
        Array(cols) { j ->
            Array(2) { INF }
        }
    }

    // Initial state: (0,0) at time 1 (parity 1)
    dist[0][0][1] = 1L

    // Priority queue: (cost, i, j, parity)
    val pq = PriorityQueue<MutableList<Long>>(Comparator { a, b -> a[0].compareTo(b[0]) })
    pq.add(arrayOf(1L, 0L, 0L, 1L))

    while (pq.isNotEmpty()) {
        val current = pq.poll()
        val cost = current[0]
        val i = current[1].toInt()
        val j = current[2].toInt()
        val parity = current[3].toInt()

        // Check if we have reached the destination
        if (i == rows - 1 && j == cols - 1) {
            return cost
        }

        // Check if current cost is larger than the recorded distance
        if (cost > dist[i][j][parity]) {
            continue
        }

        // Process based on parity
        if (parity == 1) {
            // Odd time: move right or down
            // Move right
            if (j + 1 < cols) {
                val newI = i
                val newJ = j + 1
                val newCost = cost + (newI + 1) * (newJ + 1)
                if (newCost < dist[newI][newJ][0]) {
                    dist[newI][newJ][0] = newCost
                    pq.add(arrayOf(newCost, newI.toLong(), newJ.toLong(), 0L))
                }
            }
            // Move down
            if (i + 1 < rows) {
                val newI = i + 1
                val newJ = j
                val newCost = cost + (newI + 1) * (newJ + 1)
                if (newCost < dist[newI][newJ][0]) {
                    dist[newI][newJ][0] = newCost
                    pq.add(arrayOf(newCost, newI.toLong(), newJ.toLong(), 0L))
                }
            }
        } else {
            // Even time: wait
            val newI = i
            val newJ = j
            val newCost = cost + waitCost[i][j]
            if (newCost < dist[newI][newJ][1]) {
                dist[newI][newJ][1] = newCost
                pq.add(arrayOf(newCost, newI.toLong(), newJ.toLong(), 1L))
            }
        }
    }

    // If no path found (should not happen)
    return -1L
}
